meaning: n.经过,通行,搬运,运输,运输线,转变vt.横越,通过,经过vi.通过n.[天] 中天,经纬仪
examples: The contents of the package may have settled in transit.
During their talks, the two presidents discussed the transit of goods between the two countries.
The Federal Transit Administration, an arm of the Department of Transportation, has even explicitly promoted SILOs.
Urban planners advise that cities with populations of more than 2 million should have mass transit systems.
